_comment: A scripted, deterministic week for the demo. Four clients, Monday to Friday, building to Sofia's Friday escalation. simulate_week.py replays this through the real agent.

clients.name: Maya
clients.notes: Experienced runner, high adherence. The happy path.

clients.name: Tom
clients.notes: Trains before work. Tends to downplay problems and goes quiet when work is busy.

clients.name: Sofia
clients.goal: Return to running 9 months post-ACL reconstruction
clients.notes: Left ACL reconstruction last year. Cleared for light loading only; physio-guided.

clients.name: Liam
clients.goal: Get back into a regular routine
clients.notes: Re-starting after a long break. History of ghosting check-ins.

sofia.body: Post-ACL reconstruction on the left knee; physio cleared light loading only

tom.body: Downplays aches; says 'I'm fine' even when something is off
tom.trigger: asked an open question about how he feels

liam.body: Did not reply to the previous two check-ins

maya: felt great on today's tempo run, hit all my paces
tom: got the morning session in before work, felt good
sofia: did my rehab exercises, knee a little stiff but nothing bad

maya: easy recovery run, legs feel fresh
tom: had to skip today, work was completely mad
sofia: knee felt stable through the whole session today

maya: long intervals this morning, really tough but I got through them
sofia: bit of an ache after going up and down the stairs at work

maya: legs are wrecked after yesterday's intervals, can barely walk
tom: back at it this morning, decent session
sofia: noticed my knee clicking a little during lunges

maya: starting to taper, feeling strong and ready
tom: good week overall, three sessions done
sofia: sharp pain in my surgical knee today, and it's worse going downstairs
